introSection: New Wilder Wild Mouse was a wooden wild mouse roller coaster built by German manufacturer Mack previously located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride first opened in 1965 on the north end of the park. It previously operated in Seattle, Washington, USA. It closed in 1971 and was later rebuilt in 1973 where the Wild Mouse is now located.

fullText:
New Wilder Wild Mouse was a wooden wild mouse roller coaster built by German manufacturer Mack previously located at Lagoon in Farmington, Utah, USA.

The ride first opened in 1965 on the north end of the park. It previously operated in Seattle, Washington, USA. It closed in 1971 and was later rebuilt in 1973 where the Wild Mouse is now located.
